core_thesis: AI can quickly identify revenue leaks by analyzing comprehensive data from call transcripts and emails.
supporting_points: Traditional dashboards only provide outcomes without insights on causation.
AI can process vast amounts of data, revealing underlying issues that may not be apparent through surface metrics.
Understanding specific gaps, such as product knowledge, can prevent losses and misattributed causes like pricing.
target_audience: CROs managing large sales teams with substantial budgets
angle: Terret Nexus uncovered a $4M revenue gap within minutes by identifying that losses were due to a feature, not price — a crucial insight no traditional dashboard could reveal.
do_not_reuse: It wasn't the price. It was a specific missing feature
